prompt_text:
### Demographics: 67-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 11 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis)
ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history
MASH
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Hemodialysis); HF (No); ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Insulin Degludec 15units once daily; Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 58.2 kg; Height 163.7 cm; BMI 21.7 kg/m²; Blood pressure 124/61 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.8%; 9 months ago 10.4%; 6 months ago 10.9%; 3 months ago 11.4%; current 10.6%), FPG (12 months ago 211mg/dL; 9 months ago 300mg/dL; 6 months ago 317mg/dL; 3 months ago 290mg/dL; current 232mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 59.9kg; 9 months ago 59.2kg; 6 months ago 55.8kg; 3 months ago 54.7kg; current 58.2kg), Height (12 months ago 163.7cm; 9 months ago 163.7cm; 6 months ago 163.7cm; 3 months ago 163.7cm; current 163.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 21.0kg/m²; current 21.7kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 125mmHg; 9 months ago 126mmHg; 6 months ago 126mmHg; 3 months ago 124mmHg; current 124mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 63mmHg; 9 months ago 62mmHg; 6 months ago 63mmHg; 3 months ago 60mmHg; current 61mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 108U/L; 9 months ago 116U/L; 6 months ago 110U/L; 3 months ago 112U/L; current 114U/L), AST (12 months ago 80U/L; 9 months ago 86U/L; 6 months ago 82U/L; 3 months ago 80U/L; current 84U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.7mg/dL; current 0.7mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 9.2mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 8.4mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 7.6mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 5.3mL/min/1.73m²; current 3mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 176mg/g; 9 months ago 206mg/g; 6 months ago 297mg/g; 3 months ago 242mg/g; current 282mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 86mg/dL; 9 months ago 81mg/dL; 6 months ago 87mg/dL; 3 months ago 79mg/dL; current 83mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 46mg/dL; 9 months ago 46mg/dL; 6 months ago 49mg/dL; 3 months ago 49mg/dL; current 47mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 158mg/dL; 9 months ago 159mg/dL; 6 months ago 159mg/dL; 3 months ago 177mg/dL; current 165mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 14.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.2g/dL; 6 months ago 12.4g/dL; 3 months ago 13.0g/dL; current 12.2g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.96 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
